comment: FRN-focused mini-book for Tier 2.3.2 mid-period reconciliation. CORP_SOFR_FRN sits inside its 2025-05-08 → 2025-08-08 coupon period, with two prior coupons already paid (2025-02-10, 2025-05-08). Exercises the multi-coupon ARRC compounding path — the same FRN at 2025-12-31 only had one in-progress period.

instruments.description: MMC $300M FRN due 2027-11-08, Compounded SOFR + 65bps. Mid-period valuation snapshot.
instruments.current_reset_rate_pct_note: Same bond as in book.json; current_reset_rate_pct is informational only — the ARRC pricer uses sofr_fixings.csv directly.
